$schema_note: Canonical project configuration. The MCP reads this file and translates it into Make variables / CMake -D flags. Make and CMake also have these same values baked in as defaults, so they work standalone too. Edit this (or override per-call via the MCP) to retarget another STM32F4 part.

firmware_pack._comment: compile_all_hal=true builds every HAL .c (unused modules become empty objects) so any peripheral the agent uses links. Set false and list 'hal_sources' to speed up builds.

toolchain._comment: Leave paths empty to let the MCP auto-discover them by globbing the STM32CubeIDE plugins directory. Values below are the discovered paths on this machine.

flash._comment: Uses STM32_Programmer_CLI (ST-LINK). For OpenOCD/J-Link adjust the MCP flash tool.

serial._comment: Defaults for the serial_* MCP tools (VCP/UART). line_ending: lf|cr|crlf|none.

swd._comment: connect_mode is for the CLI-based read_memory/write_memory (HOTPLUG = attach to a running target, no reset; reuses flash.port + flash.frequency_khz). The openocd_* keys + tcl_port drive live_memory_* (persistent OpenOCD). Use stlink-dap.cfg (NOT the hla stlink.cfg, which hits an 'infinite eval recursion' bug in ST's swj-dp.tcl).
